query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO family_tree (name, nickname, relationship, generation, birth_year, death_year, bio, is_key_figure, parent_id, created_at) VALUES
('Seabrun "Candy" Hunter Sr.', 'Candy', 'Patriarch / Founder', 0, '1945', '2018', 'The foundation of everything. Seabrun "Candy" Hunter Sr. was a visionary, protector, and builder. His spirit lives on through the Candy AI Guardian and the entire Canryn Production ecosystem.', true, NULL, NOW()),
('Helen Hunter', 'Grandma Helen', 'Matriarch', 0, '1948', '2020', 'The heart of the family. Helen Hunter held everything together with grace, strength, and unconditional love. Her pageant legacy and community leadership inspired generations.', true, NULL, NOW()),
('Ty Bat Zan', NULL, 'CEO / Visionary', 1, NULL, NULL, 'Founder and CEO of Canryn Production. Built the QUMUS autonomous ecosystem from vision to reality. Carries forward the legacy of Candy Hunter with technology, music, and community empowerment.', true, NULL, NOW()),
('LaShanna', NULL, 'Family / Operator', 1, NULL, NULL, 'Key family member and operator within the Canryn Production ecosystem. Manages broadcasting operations and community engagement.', false, NULL, NOW()),
('Carlos', NULL, 'Family / Operator', 1, NULL, NULL, 'Family member and operator. Contributes to the ecosystem through content creation and community outreach.', false, NULL, NOW()),
('Sean', NULL, 'Family / Operator', 1, NULL, NULL, 'Family member and operator within the Canryn Production network. Active in broadcasting and event coordination.', false, NULL, NOW()),
('Tyanna', NULL, 'Family / Next Generation', 2, NULL, NULL, 'Next generation of the Hunter legacy. Represents the future of Canryn Production and the continuation of family values through technology and creativity.', false, NULL, NOW()),
('Jaelon', NULL, 'Family / Next Generation', 2, NULL, NULL, 'Next generation carrier of the Hunter legacy. Growing up within the ecosystem that was built to preserve and empower the family''s future.', false, NULL, NOW());
